prompt: Keep the woman EXACTLY as in the source photo — her face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, the bag she carries, and her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress all unchanged and photoreal. Do NOT change her identity, her pose, or the dress pattern or color. Treat her as a fixed, locked foreground layer — do not repose or relight her. COMPLETELY REPLACE the entire original background — remove ALL of the flowers, plants and greenery behind her. Generate ONLY a new background and the ground she stands on: a characterful whitewashed Cycladic wall: textured limewash with a weathered wooden shutter and an old aged-metal wall lantern adding warmth and detail, with pale stone steps beside her. No lavender and no pots — keep the base clean, letting the warm directional light and a soft cast shadow carry the scene. Soft warm late-afternoon Mediterranean daylight from the side, with a soft realistic contact shadow grounding her to the scene. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color — a real photograph, never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
